sense.definition: an electrical device that pulls up dirt and dust from a floor to clean it

examples.x: Before using the vacuum cleaner, make sure to remove any large objects from the floor.
I borrowed my neighbor's vacuum cleaner to clean my apartment.
My mom uses the vacuum cleaner to clean the carpets every week.
The old vacuum cleaner stopped working, so we bought a new one.
The vacuum cleaner makes cleaning the house much easier.

sense.definition: a portable device that generates heat and is used to warm up a small area or room

examples.x: I plugged in the space heater to warm up the living room on a cold evening.
The space heater made the bedroom much more comfortable during the winter months.
I bought a new space heater for the garage to work in during the colder seasons.
We use a space heater in the office to stay warm when the central heating is not enough.
She set up a space heater next to her desk to keep warm while working from home.

sense.definition: a machine that uses high-pressure water spray to remove dirt, grime, and other types of stubborn stains from surfaces

examples.x: I used a pressure washer to clean the driveway, and it removed all the dirt and oil stains quickly.
You can rent a pressure washer from the hardware store if you need to clean your patio.
After the rain, I took out the pressure washer to wash off the mud from my car.
The workers used a pressure washer to remove years of grime from the building’s walls.
A pressure washer is a great tool for cleaning outdoor furniture that has collected dust and pollen.

sense.definition: a machine that is designed to cool and dry the air in a room, building, or vehicle

examples.x: He called a technician to repair the air conditioner when it stopped working.
The air conditioner cools the room quickly, even on the hottest days.
The air conditioner has a timer function, so you can set it to turn off automatically.
The air conditioner's remote control allows you to adjust the temperature from a distance.
They turned up the air conditioner when guests arrived to keep everyone comfortable.

sense.definition: an appliance that increases the moisture level in a room or an entire building

examples.x: The humidifier in the bedroom helped ease my dry throat during the winter months.
She turned on the humidifier to add moisture to the air after noticing her skin felt dry.
The plant in the corner thrived with the extra moisture from the humidifier.
He refilled the humidifier to keep the air in his room from getting too dry.
The baby’s room has a humidifier to ensure the air stays moist and comfortable for better sleep.

sense.definition: a device that reduces the amount of moisture in the air, typically used to maintain a comfortable and healthy humidity level in a room or building

examples.x: The dehumidifier in the basement keeps the air dry and prevents mold from growing on the walls.
We had to buy a dehumidifier because the humidity in our apartment was making the air feel heavy and uncomfortable.
I noticed the furniture started to feel drier and less sticky after I turned on the dehumidifier.
After using the dehumidifier for a few days, the musty smell in the bathroom disappeared.
The dehumidifier ran all night, and by morning, the room felt much more comfortable.

sense.definition: an electric device with blades that rotate quickly and keep an area cool

examples.x: He adjusted the fan's speed to get the right level of airflow.
She placed a small fan on her desk to stay refreshed while studying.
The fan is energy-efficient, so it won't increase your electricity bill much.

sense.definition: a device designed to remove pollutants and particles such as dust, smoke, and allergens from the air in a room

examples.x: I use an air purifier in my bedroom to help with my allergies.
After the smoke from the wildfire reached our area, we turned on the air purifier to clear the air.
An air purifier is essential for people who suffer from asthma or other respiratory issues.
We decided to buy an air purifier for the office to help with dust and pollen.
She placed an air purifier in the nursery to ensure the baby breathes clean air.

sense.definition: a device that uses steam to clean and sanitize surfaces

examples.x: I used the steam cleaner to remove stubborn stains from the kitchen tiles.
She brought out the steam cleaner to sanitize the upholstery after the party.
I love how quickly the steam cleaner lifts dirt from the floor without much effort.
The steam cleaner helped get rid of the grease on the stove and countertops.

sense.definition: a machine used to sew fabric and other materials together with thread

examples.x: She used a sewing machine to create her own dress.
The sewing machine broke while stitching the fabric.
He learned to use a sewing machine at a young age.
I need a new needle for my sewing machine.
The sewing machine sped up the process of making the curtains.

sense.definition: a compact, mobile unit that can be easily moved from room to room and used to cool a specific area or space

examples.x: The portable air conditioner kept the living room cool during the summer heat.
He bought a portable air conditioner for his office to stay comfortable during the summer months.
The portable air conditioner is perfect for cooling down small spaces like apartments or dorm rooms.
We set up the portable air conditioner in the kitchen while we cooked, as it gets very warm in there.

sense.definition: a type of air conditioning unit that is installed in a window or through a wall and is designed to cool a single room or area

examples.x: The window air conditioner kept the living room cool during the hot summer days.
We installed a window air conditioner in the bedroom to sleep comfortably at night.
He adjusted the settings on the window air conditioner to lower the temperature in the kitchen.
We decided to buy a window air conditioner for the office because the fans weren't enough to cool the space.

sense.definition: a type of electric fan that oscillates and is designed to be tall and narrow, often with a sleek and modern appearance

examples.x: The tower fan in the living room kept the air cool during the hot summer day.
She set up the tower fan near the window to help circulate the air in the room.
The tower fan has multiple speed settings, so I can adjust it depending on how warm it gets.
I like how the tower fan doesn't take up much space but still cools the entire room.

sense.definition: a device that cools the air by passing it over water-soaked pads or through a water mist

examples.x: The air cooler worked great in the dry climate, making the room feel much more comfortable.
My office just got an air cooler, and it has made a noticeable difference in the temperature.
I bought an air cooler to keep my room cool during the hot summer months.
We use an air cooler instead of an air conditioner because it uses less electricity.

sense.definition: a device that converts electrical energy into heat to provide warmth in a room or space

examples.x: The electric heater quickly warmed up the living room on a chilly evening.
She plugged in the electric heater to stay warm while reading her book.
The small electric heater was perfect for heating the guest room during the night.
During the winter months, the electric heater was a lifesaver in the office.
They used an electric heater in the garage to work comfortably in the colder weather.

sense.definition: a built-in vacuum cleaning system that is installed inside a building and connected to a network of inlets throughout the building

examples.x: The central vacuum system in our house makes cleaning so much easier, as we no longer have to carry a heavy vacuum around.
My grandmother loves the central vacuum system because it is quieter than the traditional vacuum she used before.
In the new office building, every floor has a central vacuum system for quick and efficient cleaning.
We had to replace the hose for the central vacuum system, but it's still much more convenient than using a regular vacuum.

sense.definition: a device that removes minerals, such as calcium and magnesium, from hard water to make it soft and more suitable for household use
a blanket with integrated electrical heating wires, which can be adjusted to different levels of warmth using a controller

examples.x: She turned on the electric blanket to keep warm during the chilly night.
After a long day, he snuggled up with an electric blanket to relax.
The electric blanket heated up quickly, making it much easier to fall asleep.
They used the electric blanket to stay cozy while watching movies on the couch.
He adjusted the settings on his electric blanket to find the perfect temperature for sleeping.

sense.definition: a small, portable vacuum cleaner designed for quick and easy cleaning of small messes and hard-to-reach areas

examples.x: She used the handheld vacuum cleaner to quickly clean the crumbs from the couch.
After spilling some dirt on the kitchen floor, I used the handheld vacuum cleaner to clean it up.
The handheld vacuum cleaner made it easy to clean the stairs without dragging a large vacuum around.
He grabbed the handheld vacuum cleaner to clean up the mess after his kids had lunch.

sense.definition: a device that removes impurities and contaminants from water to make it safe for drinking and other purposes

examples.x: She uses a water purifier to ensure the water she drinks is free from harmful chemicals.
After traveling to a remote area, they used a water purifier to make sure the water was safe to drink.
We installed a water purifier in our home to avoid using bottled water.
The water purifier in the kitchen helps improve the taste of the tap water.

sense.definition: an electric machine used for washing clothes

examples.x: He forgot to empty the pockets before putting the clothes in the washing machine.
My parents bought a new washing machine with advanced features.
She put her dirty clothes in the washing machine and added detergent.
The washing machine has different settings for different types of fabrics.
The washing machine's spin cycle helps remove excess water from the clothes.

sense.definition: a machine used to remove moisture from clothes, hair, or other items through heat or airflow

examples.x: She put the wet clothes in the dryer.
He uses a dryer to quickly dry his laundry.
Modern dryers have energy-efficient settings.
He prefers paper towels over the hand dryer in public bathrooms.
After a swim, she used a dryer to dry her damp hair.
The noisy dryer kept running late into the night.

sense.definition: a piece of equipment with a heated flat metal base, used to smooth clothes

examples.x: The iron is hot, so be careful when touching it.
The iron removes wrinkles from the fabric and makes it smooth.

sense.definition: a device that uses hot steam to remove wrinkles and creases from clothing and other fabrics

examples.x: I used a garment steamer to remove the wrinkles from my dress before the party.
She prefers using a garment steamer because it’s gentler on her clothes.
After washing the shirt, I hung it up and steamed it with a garment steamer.
I packed my garment steamer for the trip to keep my clothes looking neat.

sense.definition: an appliance that is used to dry clothes, towels, and other fabrics using forced air and sometimes heat

examples.x: After washing my sweater, I placed it in the drying cabinet to avoid damaging the fabric.
I used the drying cabinet to quickly dry my gym clothes after a workout.
Instead of hanging my delicate dress outside, I put it in the drying cabinet to ensure it stays in perfect condition.
After washing the towels, I placed them in the drying cabinet to get them soft and dry.

sense.definition: a machine used to clear snow from surfaces such as driveways, sidewalks, and roads

examples.x: The snow blower quickly cleared the driveway, saving me hours of shoveling.
After the heavy snowstorm, I used the snow blower to clear the path to the front door.
My neighbor lent me his snow blower because my driveway was buried under several feet of snow.
I prefer using a snow blower over a shovel because it’s much less tiring.
As the snow piled up, I pulled out the snow blower to keep our walkway safe and clear.

sense.definition: a mop that utilizes steam to sanitize and clean hard flooring surfaces, such as tile, laminate, or hardwood, by loosening dirt and grime

examples.x: She used the steam mop to clean the kitchen floor without using any chemicals.
I love how quickly the steam mop dries the floor after cleaning.
After the party, she grabbed the steam mop to clean up all the spilled drinks.
He prefers using a steam mop over a regular mop because it’s more hygienic.
The steam mop made it easy to remove stubborn stains from the bathroom tiles.
